policy: Values here fix XBRL coverage gaps or concept mismatches. grossMarginPct is from public segment reporting. fcf_usd_millions is operating cash flow from latest annual report. All figures are TTM as of mid-2025 unless noted. Refresh each quarter.

BWXT.gross_margin_note: Cost-plus defense contracts; ~27% gross margin from 2025 public reporting. XBRL returns null for this concept.
BWXT.fcf_note: Free cash flow from 2025 annual report. Capital-intensive business; FCF lags net income.

CLS.gross_margin_note: Contract manufacturing gross margin ~10-11%; XBRL concept mismatch causes null return.
CLS.fcf_note: FCF from 2025 annual report. Strong conversion given asset-light model.

KNSL.gross_margin_note: Not applicable for insurance. Use combined ratio (77.4%) as the primary quality metric. XBRL gross margin concept does not map to insurance economics.
KNSL.fcf_note: Operating cash flow from 2025 annual report. Insurance FCF is effectively operating cash flow before investment activity.

APP.gross_margin_note: Software-driven gross margin ~76% from 2025 public reporting. XBRL returns null.
APP.fcf_note: FCF from 2025 annual report. Exceptionally high FCF conversion from software platform.
